member.office_address: 1126 Longworth House Office Building Washington DC 20515-2106

form_analysis.form_header_text: Congressional Appropriations Requests for Fiscal Year 2027
form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
Office of Rep. Seth Moulton (MA-06)

A message from Seth:

As your Representative in Congress, I can submit federal program and funding priority recommendations to the Appropriations Committee of the U.S. House of Representatives that reflect the needs of our district.

Please complete the following form with as much detail as possible. Your input and participation are very helpful in determining which programs are most important to you and to our communities in Massachusetts.

Appropriations for this year remain uncertain due to the new administration's approach to federal budgets and Congressional funding. There is no guarantee that FY26 Appropriations will follow the usual process, and we will update this form as needed. 

My team may reach out for additional information to help understand or clarify your request, so please ensure your contact email and phone numbers are correct. While we cannot guarantee the outcome, we look forward to working with you to help serve our district.

sections.description: Please provide contact information for the individual and organization submitting this request.

fields.label: Appropriations Subcommittee/Bill that will handle your funding request
fields.help_text: Identify the House Appropriations Subcommittee with jurisdiction over this request.
options: Labor, Health & Human Services, and Education
fields.rationale: NASA's Science Mission Directorate is funded through the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies appropriations bill.

fields.label: Indicate which of the following you are requesting
fields.help_text: Select programmatic, bill language, or report language requests.
options: Programmatic Request (For example: Increase LIHEAP funding in the President's FY 2017 budget by $10 million)
Bill Language (For example: Insert the following language into the Defense Appropriations Bill...)
Report Language (For example: Insert the following report language into the Report accompanying the Defense Appropriations Bill...)
fields.draft_value: Programmatic Request (For example: Increase LIHEAP funding in the President's FY 2017 budget by $10 million)
fields.rationale: The request context explicitly identifies this as a programmatic funding request.

fields.label: Please keep the proposed language as concise as possible.
fields.rationale: The funding ask for NASA's Science Mission Directorate is $9 billion for the upcoming fiscal year, as specified in the programmatic request context.

fields.label: Desired Funding Level
fields.help_text: Select the level of support requested.
options: Support the President's FY2021 budget request
fields.rationale: The request is for a specific programmatic funding level of $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate.

fields.label: Specific Dollar Amount Requested
fields.rationale: This is the exact funding ask amount provided in the reference values.

fields.label: Did you make the same (or similar) request to my office last year?
fields.rationale: Information regarding prior year constituent submissions is not available in the provided context.

fields.label: Is this request being submitted to other Members of Congress?
fields.draft_value: Yes, this request is being coordinated with multiple offices to show broad support for NASA's science objectives.
fields.rationale: The reference values indicate existing support from Reps. Don Bacon and Judy Chu, implying a multi-member effort.

fields.label: Please describe briefly why you think this funding request is important to our communities on the North Shore.
fields.draft_value:
* NASA Science funding supports high-tech jobs on the North Shore, including over $2.2 million in direct obligations to district institutions like Jeol USA in Peabody and Spectral Sciences in Burlington since FY 2023.
* Local expertise at Jeol USA ($4.8M award) provides advanced microscopy essential for analyzing returned space samples, keeping MA-06 at the forefront of extraterrestrial research.
* Funding empowers Spectral Sciences to lead research on planetary haze and space situational awareness, directly contributing to the district's innovation economy and STEM talent pipeline.
* These investments sustain a specialized workforce and provide a steady demand for the cutting-edge R&D and manufacturing capabilities found across our North Shore communities.
fields.rationale: The draft cites specific local economic data, including $2.2M in recent obligations and the $4.8M award to Jeol USA in Peabody. It also references Spectral Sciences in Burlington, both of which are within Representative Moulton's district (MA-6).

top_grants.description: Execute a balanced science program based on discipline-specific guidance from the national academies of sciences  engineering  and medicine  administration priorities  and direction from congress.   Participate as a key partner and enabler in the agency S exploration initiative  focusing on scientific research of  on  and from the moon  lunar orbit  Mars  and beyond.   Advance discovery in emerging fields by identifying and exploiting cross-disciplinary opportunities between traditional science disciplines   develop a directorate-wide  target-user focused approach to applied programs  including Earth science applications  space weather  planetary defense  and space situational awareness.
top_grants.generated_award_summary: Guiding NASA exploration science across Moon, Mars, and space situational awareness.
